Auditvia was built for a post-overlay era — where accessibility means engineering, not illusion.

Real compliance. No overlays.

summary:
Building a startup is not my original purpose. 

When I was a university student, I was lucky to be selected into an international volunteer team that helped the Indonesian community build up their basic infrastructure and elementary education.

During that time, I had a deep reflection since people who joined this program come from 7 different countries with various higher level education, but yet the positive impact that we used to contribute is our labor force. If we could unlock the power of finance to drive change with the knowledge we learned, we could speed up the progress and make bigger impacts.

Several months later, I want to build my financial security with what I learned and avoid conflict of interests in the financial industry.

Interestingly, the deeper I learned, the more I realized that the core spirit of personal finance relates to sustainability. It is all about the balance between the future and the current needs.

That’s when I started to learn if there was any business model that could unlock positive change.

In fact, 2-3 years ago, I worked on a pure individual climate action idea with my friends. We have followed up Aspiration and Commons(Joro) in the USA, and Doconomy in Sweden to identify the monetization methods. However, we did not make it with solid monetization methods.

In 2023, with the AI breakthrough in customization, I decided to reorganize our work in the past. Meanwhile, I joined the 18-week ECOTA Regenerative Finance program and met several great people who drive collective climate action. Therefore, my startup journey begins.

summary:
As a Managed IT Services firm, we specialize in helping small businesses navigate the often-overwhelming world of technology. I love partnering with business owners who are just starting to discover how the right technology can drive their success. It’s incredibly rewarding to take a company from having no structure or tech strategy to seeing them grow exponentially with the right tools in place. One of my favorite success stories was working with a small business that had 45 employees but no technology guidance, they were struggling to keep up. Together, we built a strong foundation that supported their growth to 65 employees, and eventually, over 100 employees across two locations during an acquisition. Being part of that journey was an incredible experience that helped me build the confidence to go out and build HVR Cloud. 

At HVR Cloud, we help business owners get control of the technology issues that tend to slow them down the most. For most small business, those challenges fall into three big areas: day-to-day operational inefficiencies, growing cybersecurity risks, and the increasing pressure to meet industry compliance requirements. Whether it’s streamlining workflows, strengthening your security posture, or making sure your technology meets compliance requirements, we step in to clean up the chaos and put the right systems in place for long-term success. Our goal is simple: to give business owners the freedom to focus on running and growing their companies without being slowed down by technology problems.

summary:

My current venture, DealSense, is proof of this philosophy. We're not reinventing sales. We're solving the biggest problem in automotive sales: good people with the right skills just need the right information at the right time. Simple concept, massive impact.

The future of AI isn't about building the most sophisticated system. It's about building the most useful one.

summary:
Founder & CEO at QSVA. Building the first platform for quantum secure human verification, a new cognitive layer that confirms real human authorization for high risk actions at the trust boundary.

Our patent pending architecture reinforces every MFA system and creates a quantum resilient foundation for identity, action integrity, and critical communications.

QSVA operates after MFA, embedded directly into high risk workflows such as payments, account recovery, privilege escalation, and other high value actions.

MFA verifies identity. QSVA verifies the human behind the action.

QSVA closes the remaining attack surface, the 20% of authentication failures that drive nearly all real world losses.

These attacks don’t break encryption, they exploit unverified human actions.AI driven phishing, real-time proxy attacks (AiTM), reset fraud, MFA fatigue, session hijacking, and recovery flow exploitation all bypass identity proofs. 

Identity shows who you are, not whether you actually authorized the action.
And as RSA/ECC/TLS face quantum era decryption risk, organizations need identity, action level verification, and workflow integrity anchored in quantum secure foundations.

If MFA solves the first 80%, QSVA finishes the job.

Now onboarding select partners - www.qsva.io
headline: Founder & CEO @ QSVA | Authentication for the AI & Quantum Era

summary:
I was born in the AI generation — but somewhere between algorithms and automation, I found SEO.

It wasn’t the vanity metrics or keyword rankings that caught my attention — it was the system. The way data, structure, and creativity come together to shape how people (and now machines) discover information. That curiosity eventually became Rechkemmer Marketing, an AI SEO agency built to help brands grow in the age of intelligent search.

Today, I help B2B SaaS companies not just to rank, but to be retrieved by LLMs like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity. My work focuses on the intersection of human intelligence, machine learning, and SEO architecture — the three forces shaping how brands are discovered in the AI era.

At Rechkemmer Marketing, we call this the Signal Layer — the structured, authoritative layer of your digital presence that determines whether AI systems can understand and cite your brand. It’s built through schema, entity optimization, and strategic content frameworks that communicate directly with both people and algorithms.

I spend my days bridging creativity and computation — designing systems that make brands more readable, reliable, and retrievable. For me, SEO isn’t about chasing rankings anymore; it’s about teaching machines who you are and why your brand deserves to be cited.

So if you’re building something bold — a product, a platform, or a movement — and you want AI to know your name, that’s where I come in.

company_description:
Rechkemmer Marketing is an AI SEO agency engineering visibility for the age of intelligent search. We combine human creativity, machine learning, and strategic SEO architecture to help brands become discoverable — not just by people, but by algorithms and large language models.
Traditional SEO was built for rankings. AI SEO is built for retrieval. Our work focuses on the Signal Layer — the structured, authoritative, and machine-readable layer of a brand’s digital presence that determines whether it will be understood, trusted, and cited by systems like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity.

The result is an ecosystem of clarity and authority that AI models recognize as credible — transforming websites from static destinations into dynamic reference points.
At the center of our identity is the Neural-R, an architectural emblem symbolizing how Rechkemmer Marketing fuses human intelligence, technical SEO precision, and AI understanding into a single continuous signal. Each node in the R represents one of our core forces: Human Creativity, SEO Structure, AI Understanding, and Growth & Output. The connecting lines represent signal flow — data moving intelligently through this cycle to produce measurable visibility.
We don’t just optimize websites. We engineer retrieval systems — living frameworks that teach machines who you are, what you know, and why your brand deserves to be cited.

Rechkemmer Marketing: Where Human Intelligence Meets Machine Precision.

summary:

This is the same idea behind fiduciary responsibility a standard of accountability that I believe has been missing from our relationship with technology. My work is now focused on applying that same standard to what I see as the single greatest trust challenge of our time: the relationship between an individual and their AI.

But this is more than just a technical solution; it’s a mission. We are building a tool to help eliminate cognitive friction and amplify human potential, starting with the neurodiverse community. The goal is to create an AI that is a truly adaptive, personal partner.

I'm always open to connecting with leaders and thinkers who are also working to build a more aligned and trustworthy future for technology.

I started Claudio Financial because I know what it feels like to be overwhelmed by money and unsure of the next step. At 19, I was chronically ill, out of school, unable to work, and $20,000 in debt. What could have been a lifelong setback became the turning point that shaped my life.

I taught myself how money really works, and within 10 months, I paid off all my debt. That transformation gave me not just financial freedom but also a mission: helping others break free from financial stress and build lasting wealth.

🌍 My Mission

I believe wealth is possible for everyone — not just people with high incomes, privilege, or insider connections. My approach challenges outdated money systems and replaces them with practical tools, clear strategies, and compassionate support that work in real life.

👥 Who I Work With

I coach individuals, couples, and families from all walks of life:
- 9-to-5 employees
- Commission-based earners
- Entrepreneurs & small business owners
- People who simply want to feel in control of their money again

Many of my clients arrive feeling:
- Overwhelmed by debt or financial stress
- Unsure where their money is going
- Successful on paper but still “broke” in reality
- Misaligned with their partner about money

Together, we create systems that bring confidence, clarity, and peace of mind.

📌 My Coaching Focus

- Breaking cycles of stress and uncertainty
- Paying off debt & creating long-term stability
- Building budgets that actually work in daily life
- Preparing for homeownership and future milestones
- Helping couples align their goals & improve financial communication

💡 What Makes My Coaching Different

I bring lived experience, deep empathy, and no-nonsense accountability. I believe:
- Budgeting is an act of self-respect, not restriction
- Financial freedom doesn’t require “f-you money” or impossible standards
- True wealth begins with everyday choices

🚀 My Vision

My long-term goal is to grow Claudio Financial into a full-service financial ecosystem that supports people with personal, business, and real estate solutions under one roof.

But at the heart of everything I do, it’s not just about numbers. It’s about:
✨ Rewriting financial narratives
✨ Breaking generational cycles
✨ Empowering people to create futures filled with peace, stability, and possibility

Your future isn’t defined by where you started — it’s defined by the decisions you make today. I’m here to help you make them count.

company_description:
Claudio Financial is a personal finance coaching company built on the belief that wealth is possible for everyone — no matter their age, income level, or background. Founded in 2023 by Samantha Claudio after she paid off $20,000 of debt in just 10 months, the company was created to challenge outdated money systems that keep people stuck and replace them with compassionate, practical, and empowering coaching.

Samantha’s story is at the heart of Claudio Financial. At 19 years old, she found herself chronically ill, out of school, unable to work, and drowning in debt. By teaching herself how money really works, she not only turned her situation around but also discovered her calling: helping others break free from the same cycles of stress and uncertainty. Claudio Financial exists to show that lasting wealth is not reserved for the privileged few — it is possible for everyday people with the right strategies and support.

Through four signature 1:1 programs, Claudio Financial helps clients take back control of their financial lives:

Where Did My Money Go? — Build clarity, awareness, and budgeting habits that actually work.
From Debt to Invest — Create a plan to pay off debt and redirect money toward long-term goals.
The Home Loan Pathway — Prepare financially for homeownership with confidence and stability.
Together Towards Financial Freedom — Help couples align on goals, values, and money management as a team.

Clients often arrive feeling overwhelmed by debt, anxious about their finances, or unsure of where their money is going. Regardless of the starting point, Claudio Financial provides judgment-free guidance, proven tools, and accountability that lead to clarity, confidence, and long-term financial peace.

Claudio Financial isn’t here to sell hype, quick fixes, or one-size-fits-all advice. It exists to prove that true wealth is built by everyday people who are ready to take control of their money, change old patterns, and create a future that lasts beyond them.

summary:
I built my first startup at 21 — a marketplace for restaurants to hire freelance staff.
It was scrappy, exciting, and chaotic in all the ways a first startup usually is.
I was bootstrapping it while working as a delivery driver, and eventually, the cash ran out before the traction kicked in.

That experience didn’t make me an expert, but it gave me something far more valuable — perspective.
I learned how founders think, what keeps them up at night, and how brutally hard it is to balance vision with survival.

After that, I went deep into marketing.
I spent years helping businesses grow — running campaigns, managing ads, the usual stuff.
But something always felt off. The startup world never left me.
The energy, the chaos, the optimism — it felt like home.

So I decided to go back.
Not as a founder this time, but as a partner.

That’s how Kyne was born — a hybrid between strategy consultancy and execution partner, built for founders who need both the thinking and the doing.
We help early-stage startups design and operationalize their Go-To-Market strategy.

Our process is simple but surgical:
Diagnose → Architect → Implement → Optimize → Evolve.
It’s designed to meet founders where they are — whether they need strategy, execution, or both.

If you’re an early-stage founder trying to turn chaos into traction, or tired of hiring “marketing help” that can’t explain what’s actually working — you’ll like working with us.

I speak founder, not corporate.
I’ve made the mistakes, burned the ad budgets, and lived the sleepless nights.
Now I help other founders skip that pain and build growth engines that actually make sense.

Follow for real playbooks, founder-level insights, and the occasional S-tier meme.
Or just shoot me a message — let’s talk about what you’re building.
headline: Founder @ Kyne | We help early-stage startups design and operationalize their Go-To-Market strategy.
job_description:
Kyne helps early-stage startups design and operationalize their Go-To-Market strategy.
We blend consultancy-level strategy with agency-style execution — giving founders both the thinking and the doing they actually need.

The model was built from years of pattern recognition, research, and firsthand experience working with brands of all shapes and sizes. I noticed the same truth repeat itself: business don’t fail because of marketing tactics — they fail because they don’t know what to do first, why they’re doing it, or how to connect the dots between strategy and execution.

So I built a system to fix that.

The Kyne Framework:
Diagnose → Architect → Implement → Optimize → Evolve.

Each phase can function as an independent productized service or as part of a full-cycle engagement. It’s modular, flexible, and designed to meet founders exactly where they are.

• Diagnose: We assess the current situation — traction bottlenecks, ICP clarity, messaging, and funnel gaps.
• Architect: We design the GTM strategy — positioning, value proposition, and channel mix.
• Implement: We execute initial experiments to validate assumptions fast.
• Optimize: We analyze results and scale what works.
• Evolve: We systematize success — helping founders scale through hires or automation.

This model was built to make GTM thinking practical.
Instead of “strategy decks” collecting dust, Kyne helps founders create clarity that compounds.

That’s why Kyne exists — to bridge the two.
company_description:
Kyne helps early-stage startups design and operationalize their Go-To-Market strategy. Whether you’re stuck on message, traction or scaling, we bring both the thinking and the doing.

Built by a founder who’s lived the chaos, we speak growth in plain English — no fluff.

DM us to get a free audit.

company_description:
Equivly is an education technology platform that helps students find their university's approved course equivalencies at community colleges so they can take classes online, save time, save money, and stay on track to graduate. We simplify one of the most confusing processes in higher education: understanding which external courses will transfer back to a student's home institution.

Each year, millions of students look for affordable and flexible alternatives to taking every class at their university. Whether they want to lighten their semester load, catch up on credits, or reduce tuition costs, community colleges often offer the same accredited courses at a fraction of the price. But transfer information is scattered across university websites, outdated PDFs, and manual advisor approvals. That's where Equivly comes in.

Our platform centralizes each institution's transfer and equivalency data, making it easy for students to search for their university, pick a class, and instantly see which community colleges offer an approved match and whether it's available online. What once took hours of digging or multiple advising appointments now takes seconds.

Equivly empowers:
• Students – to save time and money by taking approved online community college courses that count toward their degree
• Parents – to lower the overall cost of their student's education
• Advisors – to streamline guidance and reduce manual credit matching
• Universities – to improve retention, completion timelines, and credit mobility
• Community colleges – to increase enrollment with clearly transferable online courses

Our mission is simple: make college more affordable, accessible, and efficient through transparent course transfer data. We're continually expanding our coverage, refining our platform, and partnering with institutions to improve the transfer credit experience nationwide so students can move through college with clarity and confidence.

✓ No agents or infrastructure changes required

company_description:
At Modern Junk Labs, we build technology that helps people understand themselves better and grow with purpose.

We’re a small studio with a big mission: to make personal development something people actually look forward to — not something that feels like work.

Our products live at the intersection of psychology, design, and storytelling. We create tools that turn self-improvement into an interactive experience that’s intuitive, gamified, and deeply personal.

Our flagship product, Main Character, is a life-portfolio app that helps people see their growth in real time. It’s a space to discover strengths, set meaningful goals, and track every area of life — from health and wealth to relationships and creativity — all in one elegant dashboard.

We believe technology should do more than grab attention; it should build confidence. It should remind people who they’re becoming, not just what they’ve done.

By combining behavioral science with world-class design, we help people see their lives as evolving stories — not endless to-do lists.

Modern Junk Labs is defining a new category called Life-Portfolio Software — tools that merge personal data, behavioral science, and gamified design to help people visualize, measure, and manage their overall life performance. Just as finance apps track net worth and CRMs manage customers, Life-Portfolio Software gives people a way to track their growth, purpose, and progress across every domain of life.

This is more than an app; it’s the foundation of a new self-improvement ecosystem that bridges productivity, wellness, and gaming into one unified experience.

Our mission is simple: make growth tangible, visual, and rewarding. We turn complexity into clarity, ambition into measurable progress, and everyday life into an interactive story worth playing.

Based in Charlotte, North Carolina, Modern Junk Labs is building the future of human-centered technology — where self-improvement feels exciting, personal, and alive.

summary: Hunter Drost is the founder of One Tenant, a concierge maintenance partner transforming how Northern Nevada investors and owners care for residential and commercial properties.As a Reno owner-operator, he saw the gap between “do nothing and hope” and “hire a full-service manager and lose control.” Listings created option overload; traditional managers bundled services owners didn’t need. The biggest hit to returns was hidden in slow decisions, poor visibility, and small issues compounding into big costs.With a hands-on background in remodels, turnovers, and project oversight, Hunter knew maintenance must be proactive and data-driven. One Tenant is that missing operating layer—focused on property health,  uptime, and ROI, without forcing owners into full-service management.Instead of reacting to every issue as a one‑off event, One Tenant uses a subscription model, a proprietary Pre‑Set Spend Limit + Authorization to Act framework, and a smart portal that learns from every work order. Owners define their thresholds, categories, and priorities once; from there, Hunter’s team is empowered to move quickly within those parameters, eliminating the lag that usually turns small fixes into larger capital events.Under Hunter’s direction, One Tenant has leaned heavily into data and AI to move maintenance from backward‑looking to forward‑looking. Every service call, inspection, and repair feeds into a living property profile that tracks patterns over time—by asset, system, season, and vendor. Those patterns are then used to:* Flag emerging issues before they become emergencies* Recommend proactive maintenance based on real history, not generic schedules* Match the right trades and vendors to the right type of problem, faster and more reliablyThis approach applies equally to residential and commercial properties. For residential investors, it means fewer surprises, better tenant experiences, and more predictable cash flow. For commercial owners and operators, it translates into reduced downtime, more predictable OpEx, and cleaner reporting.
headline: Obsessed with Simplifying Rental Property Maintenance | Founder at One Tenant | Financial Planner & CFP® Empowering Industry Disruptors to Grow, Protect and Transfer Wealth
all_skills: Project Management,Commercial Real Estate,Residential Real Estate,real estate maintanence,Economic Research,Financial Analysis
company_description:
Today there are more than 65 million residential and commercial units that all need constant upkeep.  The challenge for property owners is obvious, keeping up with maintenance while not being woken up at night for a leaking toilet or sacrificing return for a full-service property manager. 

Maintenance is also one of the leading causes of tenant churn. When surveyed 40% of tenant turnover is attributed to poor maintenance or slow response. This turnover comes at a steep cost, with an average turnover cost of roughly $3800 when you account for vacancy, repairs, concessions, and leasing fees. Better maintenance protects your return, and your investment.

That’s why we built One Tenant. Our subscription based model allows us to employ a proprietary Pre‑Set Spend Limit and Authorization to Act. You set thresholds, categories, and priorities; we’re empowered to act instantly under those limits. You keep control and visibility. We handle the routine and minor issues without the back‑and‑forth that erodes tenant confidence….— trusted, trackable, and efficient.

Behind the scenes, our portal learns from every request. It builds a profile for each property, spots patterns, and suggests proactive spend, before small issues become expensive problems. We deliver on this through our vetted provider network with pre‑negotiated terms for predictable pricing and faster response times.

Our mission is simple: reduce turnover and increase return.

summary:
I’m a U.S. Marine Corps combat engineer turned supply chain and operations professional, transitioning to Washington, D.C. to begin the M.S. in Supply Chain Management at Georgetown University. My focus is on the intersection of defense, logistics, and government contracting—building systems that keep people and missions supported.

In the Marine Corps, I led construction and engineering projects, coordinated logistics across dispersed environments, and managed accountability for millions of dollars of equipment. That experience taught me how critical procurement, inventory management, maintenance, and planning are to mission success.

After separating, I founded Silent Break Solutions, a veteran-owned consulting firm that helps small businesses—especially veteran-owned—navigate government registrations and compete for contracts. I’ve managed client onboarding, SAM.gov/SBA setup, and proposal support, giving me a strong view into how federal supply chains and vendors fit together.

I also spent time in tech sales, which sharpened my communication, outbound prospecting, and relationship-building skills. Even though that company eventually folded, the experience reinforced that I enjoy being in roles that sit between technical teams, leadership, and customers.

At Georgetown, I’m excited to deepen my skills in data-driven decision-making, operations analytics, and global supply chain strategy—and to apply that directly in the defense and aerospace ecosystem.

Areas of interest:
• Defense & aerospace supply chain
• Logistics, inventory, and asset management
• Government contracting & vendor management
• Operations / program management in defense tech

I’m open to conversations about internships, early-career supply chain roles, and defense-focused opportunities in the D.C. area and beyond—especially where my background as a Marine, founder, and soon-to-be Georgetown SCM student can add real value.

I help organizations repair and elevate customer experience platforms that never reached their full potential. After years leading technology teams and designing contact center ecosystems, I have developed a specialty in diagnosing flawed implementations and turning them into stable, intelligent, and insight driven environments. Instead of forcing clients into full replacements, I take the platforms they already own and connect them to the right data, events, and AI driven logic. The result is cleaner routing, lower handling time, and an agent experience that finally matches the promise of the tools.

I partner with executives, architects, and operations leaders to clarify what success should look like and then build the architecture and workflows that make it real. I run discovery sessions, map data paths across platforms, design event driven interactions, and align contact center decisions with measurable outcomes. I also help teams adopt AI safely and effectively by introducing translation, summarization, intent inference, and knowledge workflows that fit their environment rather than overwhelm it.

Core strengths
• Amazon Connect including Lex, Lambda, EventBridge, Kinesis, and DynamoDB
• Salesforce Service Cloud Voice and CRM including CTI and digital service processes
• AI and GenAI interaction flows including real time translation, summarization, and knowledge delivery
• KPI design and analytics with QuickSight and CRM reporting
• Complex integration work across existing CRMs, case systems, legacy ACDs, and data sources
• Program leadership, stakeholder facilitation, and corrective action planning for troubled CX programs
• Regulatory readiness including PCI, HIPAA, and state or federal compliance

Through Aetheria Systems I work with clients who want a senior partner who can diagnose issues rapidly, communicate clearly, and deliver practical, grounded solutions. If you are responsible for a customer experience platform that is underperforming and you want to stabilize, modernize, or extend it with AI, I am open for new client engagements.

Activdate is the convergence of those worlds into a single platform. It is built to fuse real-world utility with social coordination at scale.

I continue building Activdate because I believe the next generation of technology must strengthen real human infrastructure, not replace it.

My long-term goal is to build regenerative systems that empower people, strengthen communities, and compound truth into the structures we rely on every day.

summary:
With a decade in the mental health field, I have dedicated my career to empowering individuals facing severe mental health challenges. As the Founder and Lead Clinician at Elevate Mental Health Supports, I specialize in facilitating psychosocial rehabilitation for people who are suffering from severe and persistent mental illness. My speciality is working with people who are suffering from Axis I diagnoses, but I also have a background of working with people who suffer from Axis II diagnoses, Substance Use Disorders, Intellectual and Development Disabilities, and Spectrum Disorders (ED, ASD). I have a background in working with people from the ages of 9-75, and currently serve anyone 12 years and older. 

One of my passions is integrating nature-based therapeutics into my work. I was privileged to take many  courses offered by the Center for Spirituality and Healing at the University of Minnesota. Many of those classes focused on Nature Based Therapeutics and its various modalities. In 2018, I earned a Volunteer Master Naturalist certification from University of Wisconsin - Maddison, enhancing my ability to incorporate ecological principles into therapeutic practices.

My background includes roles in acute behavioral health settings such as mental health hospital units and residential programs, case management, and program development, all of which have shaped my holistic approach to mental health care. I am committed to exploring innovative ways to bridge traditional therapeutic models with experiential and nature-based practices, ensuring that the people I work with receive comprehensive, transformative care. Whether in the office or the natural world, my mission remains the same: to foster connection, meaning, and sustainable change for a better quality of life.

I offer Therapuetic Coaching sessions that are in nature and based on the principles of Nature Based Therapeutics. I am currently offering a free nature therapy group series that will continue through the warm season of 2025. My training and experience in facilitating nature therapy experiences has allowed me to support people in deepening their connection to self, community, and nature.
headline: Lead Clinician and Founder at Elevate Mental Health Supports

company_description:
Elevate Mental Health Supports is a community-centered program based in Boulder, CO, designed to serve individuals ages 12+ living with serious mental health challenges. We specialize in psychosocial rehabilitation, combining therapeutic coaching, case management, and independent living skills training to promote independence, self-awareness, and long-term stability.

Our services include:
    •    Mental Health Consulting
    •    Rehabilitative Case Management
    •    Independent Living Skills Training
    •    Therapeutic Coaching grounded in CBT
    •    Support Groups for peer connection and empowerment

We work with clients navigating conditions such as psychosis, bipolar disorder, and dual diagnoses. Services are available in-person and virtually to meet a range of needs.

Led by Leonora Otto, MAP, our approach integrates cognitive behavioral therapy, dialectical behavior therapy, Adlerian theory, and nature-based modalities. Leonora brings 10+ years of experience across inpatient, residential, and outpatient settings, with a deep commitment to holistic, accessible, client-centered care.

Through nature-based initiatives, including bimonthly donation-based nature therapy events, Elevate fosters healing through connection—with the self, the community, and the earth.

We offer free 15-minute consultations to determine fit and create a pathway to meaningful support.
